Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/app.py:1	from flask import Flask, render_template, request, redirect, url_for, flash2	from database import db3	from models import URL4	import string5	import random6	import os7	8	app = Flask(__name__)9	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///urls.db'10	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False11	app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'secret_key'12	13	db.init_app(app)14	15	with app.app_context():16	    db.create_all()17	18	def generate_short_code(length=6):19	    chars = string.ascii_letters + string.digits20	    while True:21	        code = ''.join(random.choice(chars) for _ in range(length))22	        if not URL.query.filter_by(short_code=code).first():23	            return code24	25	@app.route('/', methods=['GET', 'POST'])26	def index():27	    if request.method == 'POST':28	        original_url = request.form.get('url')29	        if not original_url:30	            flash('URL is required!')31	            return redirect(url_for('index'))32	        33	        existing_url = URL.query.filter_by(original_url=original_url).first()34	        if existing_url:35	            short_url = request.host_url + existing_url.short_code36	        else:37	            short_code = generate_short_code()38	            new_url = URL(original_url=original_url, short_code=short_code)39	            db.session.add(new_url)40	            db.session.commit()41	            short_url = request.host_url + short_code42	        43	        return render_template('index.html', short_url=short_url)44	    45	    return render_template('index.html')46	47	@app.route('/<short_code>')48	def redirect_to_url(short_code):49	    url_entry = URL.query.filter_by(short_code=short_code).first_or_404()50	    return redirect(url_entry.original_url)51	52	if __name__ == '__main__':53	    app.run(debug=True)
